NuGet Hierarchy is a tool allowing the view the hierarchy of the NuGet packages found in a solution

      --help, -h             Displays this help screen
      --solution, -s=solution
                             Path to the solution
      --outputfile, -o=file  Path to a file where to write the tree
      --sourceFeed, --sf=url|accessToken
                             The NuGet feed from where to download the packages;
                                a private feed can be specified with the format
                               url|accessToken
